behavior_summary: This script is a thin adapter for an east-west door object: it exposes handlers for U8P_TDOOR_EW::look, U8P_TDOOR_EW::use, and hit events and forwards those events to shared door-system routines rather than implementing door logic locally.
U8P_TDOOR_EW::look delegates inspection behavior to DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked to report lock state or otherwise handle examine-time feedback.
U8P_TDOOR_EW::use forwards activation/U8P_TDOOR_EW::use attempts to DOOR_NS::useDoor to perform opening/toggling behavior.
U8P_TDOOR_EW::gotHit forwards impact/hit events (uword, word) to DOOR_NS::func0C82 to let the door system handle damage/sound/animation or notification.
notable_control_flow: All in-script handlers are single-purpose and immediately call out to DOOR_NS functions: there is no branching, menu logic, or flag/state manipulation inside this script.
The U8P_TDOOR_EW::look handler runs as a process (process-type 0x0208) and likely executes when the player examines the door or enters a U8P_TDOOR_EW::look-type fast-area trigger.
Event parameters (for U8P_TDOOR_EW::gotHit) are forwarded directly to the external handler; no local processing occurs before the call.
open_questions: DOOR_NS::func0C82's exact runtime effects are unknown — it likely handles hit feedback (damage, sound, animation, or notification) but the specific outcome when called from U8P_TDOOR_EW::gotHit is not present here (confidence: low).
Whether U8P_TDOOR_EW::look is invoked both by an explicit player 'U8P_TDOOR_EW::look' action and by entering a fast-area trigger is inferred but not proven by this file alone (confidence: medium).

main_function.name: U8P_TDOOR_EW::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's examine/inspection of this east-west door by delegating to the shared door-system's lock-check routine so the system can report lock state or block actions.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player uses the 'U8P_TDOOR_EW::look' (examine) action on the door.
May also be invoked when an actor enters a U8P_TDOOR_EW::look-type fast-area trigger for the door (inferred).

function_map.name: U8P_TDOOR_EW::look
function_map.role: exam/inspect adapter that delegates to DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked

function_map.name: U8P_TDOOR_EW::use
function_map.role: activation/U8P_TDOOR_EW::use adapter that delegates to DOOR_NS::useDoor

function_map.name: U8P_TDOOR_EW::gotHit
function_map.role: impact/hit adapter that forwards parameters to DOOR_NS::func0C82

function_map.name: DOOR_NS::checkDoorLocked
function_map.role: external door-system check used by U8P_TDOOR_EW::look

function_map.name: DOOR_NS::useDoor
function_map.role: external door-system U8P_TDOOR_EW::use/open routine invoked by U8P_TDOOR_EW::use

function_map.name: DOOR_NS::func0C82
function_map.role: external door-system hit handler invoked by U8P_TDOOR_EW::gotHit (effects inferred)

external_calls.purpose: Check/report whether the door is locked when inspected; drives examine-time feedback and may prevent U8P_TDOOR_EW::use/open.
Perform the door open/U8P_TDOOR_EW::use operation (toggle or attempt to open) in the shared door system.
Forward impact/hit parameters (uword, word) to the door-system hit handler for damage/sound/animation/notification handling.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script is a thin adapter for an east-west door object: it exposes handlers for U8P_TDOOR_EW::look, U8P_TDOOR_EW::use, and hit events and forwards those events to shared door-system routines rather than implementing door logic locally.
